'''shachatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibadah|ibadah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibadah|ibadah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shachatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæchæthæth|shæchæthæth]] || [[word:shæchæthæj|shæchæthæj]] || [[word:shæchæthæsh|shæchæthæsh]] || [[word:shæchæthæ|shæchæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachachathath|shachachathath]] || [[word:shachachathaj|shachachathaj]] || [[word:shachachathash|shachachathash]] || [[word:shachachatha|shachachatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachathath|shachathath]] || [[word:shachathaj|shachathaj]] || [[word:shachathash|shachathash]] || [[word:shachatha|shachatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachafthath|shachafthath]] || [[word:shachafthaj|shachafthaj]] || [[word:shachafthash|shachafthash]] || [[word:shachafthaf|shachafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shachathatha|shachathatha]] || [[word:shachathaja|shachathaja]] || [[word:shachathasha|shachathasha]] || [[word:shachathaka|shachathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shachathath|shachathath]] || [[word:shachathaj|shachathaj]] || [[word:shachathash|shachathash]] || [[word:shachatha|shachatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shachathathal|shachathathal]] || [[word:shachathajal|shachathajal]] || [[word:shachathashal|shachathashal]] || [[word:shachathakal|shachathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shachathathatha|shachathathatha]] || [[word:shachathajaja|shachathajaja]] || [[word:shachathashasha|shachathashasha]] || [[word:shachathaka|shachathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shachathathan|shachathathan]] || [[word:shachathajan|shachathajan]] || [[word:shachathashan|shachathashan]] || [[word:shachathakan|shachathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shachathathaoro|shachathathaoro]] || [[word:shachathajaoro|shachathajaoro]] || [[word:shachathashaoro|shachathashaoro]] || [[word:shachathakaoro|shachathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
